scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && echo 'export * from "./generated/api";' > ../api-zod/src/index.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='../api-client-react/src/index.ts';const lines=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').split('\n').filter(l=>!l.includes('api.schemas'));fs.writeFileSync(p,lines.join('\n'));" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
